raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged for something I didnt order. I paid the real balance owed and canceled the card XXXX months ago. I keep getting texts saying I had ordered XXXX XXXX XXXX  and owe {$380.00}. There is a {$600.00} bill on the canceled card that Citibank keeps trying to collect. I have called Citibank about XXXX times to no avail. I can only reach another person who cant deal with the situation and says they will transfer me. I get another person who cant help me. I only have XXXX subscription to XXXX XXXX premium that is valid until XX/XX/year>. I have paid for that. 
I will not pay a new balance on a canceled card and never used Citibank to pay for XXXX XXXX. This same situation has happened XXXX before! XXXX
